title: PCR (Toehold) Fragment Protocol for a 25ul reaction
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"7ej0n","text":"Q5 reaction buffer- 5ul","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"46t9r","text":"dNTPs- 1ul","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"euiq7","text":"Primer mix- 2.5ul","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9ja7","text":"(1.25ul per primer)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"25hcc","text":"Q5 High Fidelity Polymerase- .25ul ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dmcb1","text":"Template DNA- *** varies 1000ng\u003c","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"duj9k","text":"Lambert iGEM: 1.5ul","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"c8a9o","text":"H20- to 25ul","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Pipette all reaction agents into pcr tube
put pcr tube in thermal cycler and set the annealing temperature to 55 degrees celsius
Annealing temperatures vary depending on DNA
1 min/2kb for Q5 High Fidelity → may vary
creator: Lambert Igem
